title: Aesthetic Bundles
description: Makes bundles customizable to your own likings
body:
!!!THIS IS (probably) THE FIRST AND ONLY VERSION WITH COLORED BUNDLES!!!

Mojang just added colored bundles in Snapshot 24w38a(I know bad timing)

**!!! This mod will temporarily be archived due to the extreme amount of work currently being done to _Iron & Steel_**


Aesthetic Bundles adds:

16 different colors of bundles

Makes bundles craftable

To craft a colored bundle combine a dye of your choice and a bundle(Recipe in gallery)

Future Plans:
Adding new themed bundles such as:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Fishing Bundle

Farming Bundle

Mineral Bundle

</details>
